name: 声
subject: science
curriculum_points: Ps.01 Identify how sounds are made, associating some of them with something vibrating.
Ps.02 Recognise that vibrations from sounds travel through a medium to the ear.
Ps.03 Find patterns between the pitch of a sound and features of the object that produced it.
Ps.04 Find patterns between the volume of a sound and the strength of the vibrations that produced it.
Ps.05 Recognise that sounds get fainter as the distance from the sound source increases.

interactive_resources.description: PhET 声音：调节频率振幅听声音变化（中文版）

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 科学探究动画：观察/假设/实验/结论可视化
